notes: Per-player, one at match start; Capital status is permanent and cumulative on capture. Port, Lumber Mill, and Harbour are only actually placeable if the Capital's site has a Water- or Forest-adjacent Plains hex respectively — they're listed here because they're not base-type-restricted, not because they're guaranteed available on every map. Stone Works is deliberately omitted: it's Foundry Reach-exclusive. Unlike Unique bases, Capital starts otherwise bare and is built up from scratch, so its initialBuildings has no defensive/production/wall entries beyond the universal HQ/Farm/Quarry seed, plus Command Centre — isFixed (see data/buildings/command_centre.json), so every Capital (including one gained by capturing a rival's) is pre-seeded with its own Command Centre rather than needing it freshly built.
